grades.draftFix:
## Add Toolbox quickstart section

```diff
+ ## Adding Tools with Toolbox
+ 
+ After deploying your basic agent, add tools via Toolbox:
+ 
+ ```python
+ from azure.ai.agents import ToolboxClient
+ 
+ toolbox = ToolboxClient(connection_id="my-connection")
+ toolbox.add_tool("web_search")
+ toolbox.add_tool("code_interpreter")
+ ```
```

improvementSuggestions.docContent: Create a 'manifest reference' page explaining agent.yaml vs agent.manifest.yaml vs azure.yaml — when to use each, required fields, and how they relate

improvementSuggestions.sampleCode: Minimal valid agent.yaml + agent.manifest.yaml + azure.yaml set for migration

grades.draftFix:
## Add manifest trinity reference

```diff
+ ## Manifest Files Reference
+ 
+ Hosted agents require three manifest files:
+ 
+ | File | Purpose | Key Fields |
+ |------|---------|------------|
+ | `agent.yaml` | Agent runtime config | name, version, framework, entrypoint |
+ | `agent.manifest.yaml` | Agent metadata | capabilities, model, tools |
+ | `azure.yaml` | Azure deployment | services, infra, hooks |
```
